  • Uses of ProcessInstanceModificationInstantiationBuilder in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.runtime

    Methods in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.runtime that return ProcessInstanceModificationInstantiationBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProcessInstanceModificationInstantiationBuilder
    ProcessInstanceModificationBuilder.startAfterActivity(String activityId, String ancestorActivityInstanceId)
    Submits an instruction that behaves like ProcessInstanceModificationBuilder.startTransition(String,String) and always instantiates the single outgoing sequence flow of the given activity.
    ProcessInstanceModificationInstantiationBuilder
    ProcessInstanceModificationBuilder.startBeforeActivity(String activityId, String ancestorActivityInstanceId)
    Submits the instruction:
    ProcessInstanceModificationInstantiationBuilder
